name: Robot Dispensing Trajectory and Velocity Profiling
description: A manufacturing engineer is programming a robot arm to dispense a liquid gasket onto a rectangular engine block. Drive the robot arm through a 4-corner rectangular path in the XY plane (spanning at least 0.15 m in X and 0.10 m in Y) and calculate a proportional adhesive flow rate (K = 5.0 mL/m) based on instantaneous velocity to prevent corner pooling. Save the simulation results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dispensing_profile.csv (columns: sim_time_s, tcp_x, tcp_y, tcp_z, j1, j2, j3, j4, j5, j6, tcp_speed_m_s, flow_rate_ml_s) and a summary to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dispensing_report.json (fields: total_path_length_m, average_speed_m_s, min_speed_m_s, max_speed_m_s, total_volume_ml, robot_base_z).
